description: Creating evidence matrix and catalytic triad comparison visualization for Epe1 demethylase hypothesis
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 1, figsize=(14, 14), gridspec_kw={'height_ratios': [1.2, 1]})

# === Panel A: Evidence Matrix ===
ax = axes[0]
ax.set_title('Evidence Matrix: Epe1 Histone Demethylase Activity (GO:0032452)', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold', pad=15)

# Define evidence items
evidence = [
    {'citation': 'Isaac et al. 2007\nPMID:17449867', 'type': 'Direct assay', 'verdict': 'Refutes',
     'finding': 'No detectable demethylase\nactivity; non-conserved\nFe(II) residues'},
    {'citation': 'Raiymbek et al. 2020\nPMID:32195666', 'type': 'Mutant/\nbiochemistry', 'verdict': 'Refutes',
     'finding': 'Non-enzymatic function;\nJmjC mutations disrupt\nSwi6 interaction'},
    {'citation': 'Trewick et al. 2007\nPMID:17948055', 'type': 'Mutant\nphenotype', 'verdict': 'Qualifies',
     'finding': 'JmjC domain required but\nmay be protein hydroxylase\nnot demethylase'},
    {'citation': 'Horton et al. 2011\nPMID:21167174', 'type': 'Structural/\nbiochemical', 'verdict': 'Refutes',
     'finding': 'PHF2 with same Tyr→His\nsubstitution is catalytically\ndead'},
    {'citation': 'Trewick et al. 2005\nPMID:15809658', 'type': 'Computational/\nreview', 'verdict': 'Qualifies',
     'finding': 'Proposed as putative\ndemethylase OR protein\nhydroxylase'},
    {'citation': 'Sorida et al. 2019\nPMID:31206516', 'type': 'In vivo\nChIP', 'verdict': 'Supports\n(indirect)',
     'finding': 'JmjC-mediated H3K9me\ndemethylation in vivo\n(could be non-enzymatic)'},
    {'citation': 'Audergon et al. 2015\nPMID:25838386', 'type': 'Genetic/\nepigenetic', 'verdict': 'Supports\n(indirect)',
     'finding': 'epe1 loss allows H3K9me\nmaintenance (genetic,\nnot direct assay)'},
    {'citation': 'Yaseen et al. 2022\nPMID:35879419', 'type': 'Genetic/\nfunctional', 'verdict': 'Qualifies',
     'finding': 'tEpe1 requires functional\nJmjC domain for resistance\n(domain required)'},
    {'citation': 'Sweta & Sharma 2021\nPMID:33533152', 'type': 'Functional/\ngenetic', 'verdict': 'Refutes',
     'finding': 'C-terminal (403-948) key;\nH3K9ac & PolII recruitment\nnot demethylation'},
    {'citation': 'Sequence analysis\n(this study)', 'type': 'Computational', 'verdict': 'Refutes',
     'finding': 'His→Tyr at Fe(II) ligand\nposition 370; incomplete\ncatalytic triad'},
    {'citation': 'PomBase\nGO:0141052', 'type': 'Database\nannotation', 'verdict': 'Refutes',
     'finding': 'NOT|enables H3\ndemethylase activity\n(IDA, PMID:16362057)'},
]

# Color map for verdict
verdict_colors = {
    'Refutes': '#FF6B6B',
    'Qualifies': '#FFD93D',
    'Supports\n(indirect)': '#95E1D3',
}

columns = ['Citation', 'Evidence Type', 'Verdict', 'Key Finding']
col_widths = [0.18, 0.12, 0.10, 0.25]

# Draw table
n_rows = len(evidence)
row_height = 0.065
start_y = 0.92

# Header
for j, col in enumerate(columns):
    x = sum(col_widths[:j]) + 0.08
    ax.text(x + col_widths[j]/2, start_y + 0.02, col, ha='center', va='center',
            fontweight='bold', fontsize=9, transform=ax.transAxes)

# Data rows
for i, ev in enumerate(evidence):
    y = start_y - (i + 1) * row_height
    values = [ev['citation'], ev['type'], ev['verdict'], ev['finding']]
    
    # Background color based on verdict
    color = verdict_colors.get(ev['verdict'], '#E8E8E8')
    rect = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch(
        (0.06, y - row_height/2 + 0.01), 0.88, row_height - 0.005,
        boxstyle="round,pad=0.002", facecolor=color, alpha=0.3,
        transform=ax.transAxes)
    ax.add_patch(rect)
    
    for j, val in enumerate(values):
        x = sum(col_widths[:j]) + 0.08
        fontsize = 7 if j == 0 else 7
        ax.text(x + col_widths[j]/2, y, val, ha='center', va='center',
                fontsize=fontsize, transform=ax.transAxes)

ax.axis('off')

# Legend
legend_patches = [
    mpatches.Patch(color='#FF6B6B', alpha=0.4, label='Refutes demethylase activity'),
    mpatches.Patch(color='#FFD93D', alpha=0.4, label='Qualifies (JmjC needed but maybe not as demethylase)'),
    mpatches.Patch(color='#95E1D3', alpha=0.4, label='Supports (indirect in vivo effects only)'),
]
ax.legend(handles=legend_patches, loc='lower center', ncol=3, fontsize=8, 
          framealpha=0.8, bbox_to_anchor=(0.5, -0.02))

# === Panel B: Catalytic triad comparison ===
ax2 = axes[1]
ax2.set_title('Fe(II) Catalytic Triad Comparison: Active vs Epe1', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold', pad=15)

proteins = ['KDM2A\n(Human)', 'Jhd1\n(S. cerevisiae)', 'Epe1\n(S. pombe)']
ligands = ['Ligand 1\n(His)', 'Ligand 2\n(Asp/Glu)', 'Ligand 3\n(His)']
residues = [
    ['H212', 'D214', 'H284'],  # KDM2A
    ['H305', 'D307', 'H377'],  # Jhd1
    ['H297', 'E299', 'Y370'],  # Epe1
]
active = [
    [True, True, True],
    [True, True, True],
    [True, False, False],  # E is tolerable but Y is not
]
# Better: for Epe1: H is OK, E may be tolerated, Y is broken
canonical = [
    [True, True, True],
    [True, True, True],
    [True, True, False],  # H is conserved, E vs D is conservative, Y for H is broken
]

bar_width = 0.2
x = np.arange(len(ligands))

for i, (prot, res_list, canon_list) in enumerate(zip(proteins, residues, canonical)):
    colors = ['#4CAF50' if c else '#F44336' for c in canon_list]
    bars = ax2.bar(x + i * bar_width, [1]*3, bar_width, label=prot, color=colors, 
                   edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5, alpha=0.8)
    for j, (bar, res) in enumerate(zip(bars, res_list)):
        ax2.text(bar.get_x() + bar.get_width()/2., 0.5, res,
                ha='center', va='center', fontweight='bold', fontsize=11, color='white')

ax2.set_xticks(x + bar_width)
ax2.set_xticklabels(ligands, fontsize=11)
ax2.set_yticks([])
ax2.set_ylim(0, 1.5)
ax2.set_xlim(-0.3, 3.1)

# Custom legend
legend_elements = [
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#4CAF50', edgecolor='black', label='Canonical (active)'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#F44336', edgecolor='black', label='Non-canonical (disrupted)'),
]
ax2.legend(handles=legend_elements, loc='upper right', fontsize=10)

# Add protein labels
for i, prot in enumerate(proteins):
    ax2.text(1 + i * bar_width, 1.15, prot, ha='center', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold')

# Add annotation about the critical finding
ax2.annotate('Critical: His→Tyr\nabolishes Fe(II) binding', 
            xy=(2.4, 0.9), xytext=(2.7, 1.3),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='red', lw=2),
            fontsize=10, color='red', fontweight='bold',
            bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.3', facecolor='lightyellow', edgecolor='red'))

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('evidence_matrix.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Evidence matrix saved.")
